summary: First end-to-end test for plugiins.com landing page. Backend (FastAPI + Mongo) and frontend (React landing) verified. 7/7 pytest tests pass, 17/17 frontend assertions pass (one self-inflicted assertion bug was discounted because the FAQ question text legitimately contains the word 'export').

minor.issue: Out-of-range limit returns 400 (custom HTTPException) but FastAPI convention would suggest 422 + Query(ge=1,le=500). Working, not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is tidy and well-typed; uses EmailStr + Pydantic v2 ConfigDict; ObjectId excluded via projection {_id:0} — good.
CTA.jsx email validation is weak: only checks for '@'. Backend EmailStr is the source of truth, which is fine, but consider tightening client-side regex for UX.
Lead list endpoint uses raw HTTPException(400). Prefer FastAPI Query(ge=1, le=500) so OpenAPI doc reflects constraint and returns 422 consistently.
Navbar 'Talk to sales' link points to #contact but no #contact section exists on the page — dead anchor.
Frontend has no robots.txt / SEO meta tags review (not requested but worth noting for a marketing landing page).
No unsubscribe/legal page linked from footer (verify with main agent if needed for compliance copy under the CTA promise).
test_credentials: n/a - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_*@example.com leads via POST /api/leads during pytest and a single TEST_playwright@example.com lead from the UI CTA submission test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested checks executed against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, JUnit XML in /app/test_reports/pytest). The Pricing default is annual=true, so Starter shows $23 / Pro $71 on first load — toggle-monthly switches to $29 / $89. FAQ default open index is 0. Mobile menu only renders after clicking nav-mobile-toggle at width<768. CTA form: invalid email shows cta-error, valid submits to POST /api/leads and reveals cta-success. No console errors observed.
